# Member Quickstart — First 60 Minutes

## 0–10 min: Pick your first workflow
Choose one workflow that is repetitive, painful, and low-risk.

## 10–25 min: Fill Golden Triangle
Map Knowledge, Instructions, and Output.

## 25–40 min: Build KOI brief
Turn the workflow into an AI employee role brief.

## 40–50 min: Add approval boundaries
Decide what AI can do alone and what must wait for a human.

## 50–60 min: Run first draft
Use a CLEAR prompt from the library and produce one review-ready output.

## End state
One workflow map, one role brief, one prompt, one AI-generated draft, one review checklist.
